title: ORA's New Resources and Services — D-RED Seminar Slides (Kamangar)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2022-09-14 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Office of Research Administration's (ORA) New Resources and Services' presented by Farin Kamangar, MD, PhD. Introduces ORA's then-new website and service catalog (since superseded by the current site).
